TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: U rakarak atu nikasaniyaru' nu i kalingkuay a Pangcah I nacudad namakayra i1985 nu miheca, nasuritan ni "Liyaw-su-ceng". Ta i 1977 nu mihecaan mala kuciw nu Siwlinsiyang, sulinay sibalucu'cira a miherek tu nabalucu'an nira atu sapatudung tu likulay a sabasaba atu wawawawa tu sapabana'tu serangawan nu Tayan atu nikasumad nu rakat a ma'urip, maan naca simainapay i ciraan, araw i 1984 mapulul cira, i papululan caay kasaterep a miherek tu nasuritan nira, milesimet aca tu nu Pangcah a masamaanay a demak tu sikabana' anini. Ina saka cacay a liyad i, pasubana'ay tu lingatu nu Pangcah, atu patudungay tu saayaway ku Pangcah i liyal a ma'urip sanay a kungku, atu serangawan nu binacadan tangasa i Talu ku raritin. Tunamahaen misurit aca tu narakatan a ma'urip nu Pangcah i Taywan, sisa cira a cacay ku mabana'ay tu sasuriten nu payniyaru'an, milesimet aca tu nay kahulaman atu karipunan nu Pangcah. Lalikul tu nu sepat a liyad, saniyaniyaru'han nira a palasepat a patatudung: makayra i amisay a Pangcah,siwkulan a Pangcah,waylay a Pangcah, atu Palidaway a Pangcah. Mapatudung nira ku 'urip atu narakatan nu Pangch. Matiya u nilesimet tunu Tayal katesek, sisa ira ku mamelawan nu mikingkiway nu niPangcah a demak. Tuna mahaen alumak ku mitaduay ku misaakuay tu nilesimet tu bana' nira a macacengang, tangasa salikulay ci Liyawsuceng tu ku sitatudungay tina cudadan, makibana' nu mikingkiway Tangasa i matini caay katerak ku nikasatapang i matini. == Pi'arawan to lakaw ==
S.PHON: o~u~u rakarak ato~u~u nikasanijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u i kaɾiŋko~u~uaj a paŋʦaħ i naʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ namakajra i**** no~u~u miħəʦa, naso~u~uritan ni "ɾijaw-so~u~u-ʦəŋ". ta i **** no~u~u miħəʦaan maɾa ko~u~uʦiw no~u~u siwɾinsijaŋ, so~u~uɾinaj sib~b~vaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡʦira a miħərək to~u~u nab~b~vaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡan nira ato~u~u sapato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u ɾiko~u~uɾaj a sab~b~vasab~b~va ato~u~u wawawawa to~u~u sapab~b~vanaʡto~u~u səraŋawan no~u~u tajan ato~u~u nikaso~u~umaɬ~ɮ no~u~u rakat a maʡo~u~urip, maan naʦa simainapaj i ʦiraan, araw i **** mapo~u~uɾo~u~uɾ ʦira, i papo~u~uɾo~u~uɾan ʦaaj kasatərəp a miħərək to~u~u naso~u~uritan nira, miɾəsimət aʦa to~u~u no~u~u paŋʦaħ a masamaanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak to~u~u sikab~b~vanaʡ anini. ina saka ʦaʦaj a ɾijaɬ~ɮ i, paso~u~ub~b~vanaʡaj to~u~u ɾiŋato~u~u no~u~u paŋʦaħ, ato~u~u pato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj to~u~u saajawaj ko~u~u paŋʦaħ i ɾijaɾ a maʡo~u~urip sanaj a ko~u~uŋko~u~u, ato~u~u səraŋawan no~u~u b~b~vinaʦaɬ~ɮan taŋasa i taɾo~u~u ko~u~u raritin. to~u~unamaħaən miso~u~urit aʦa to~u~u narakatan a maʡo~u~urip no~u~u paŋʦaħ i tajwan, sisa ʦira a ʦaʦaj ko~u~u mab~b~vanaʡaj to~u~u saso~u~uritən no~u~u pajnijaro~u~uʡan, miɾəsimət aʦa to~u~u naj kaħo~u~uɾaman ato~u~u karipo~u~unan no~u~u paŋʦaħ. ɾaɾiko~u~uɾ to~u~u no~u~u səpat a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, sanijanijaro~u~uʡħan nira a paɾasəpat a patato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ: makajra i amisaj a paŋʦaħ,siwko~u~uɾan a paŋʦaħ,wajɾaj a paŋʦaħ, ato~u~u paɾiɬ~ɮawaj a paŋʦaħ. mapato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ nira ko~u~u ʡo~u~urip ato~u~u narakatan no~u~u paŋʦħ. matija o~u~u niɾəsimət to~u~uno~u~u tajaɾ katəsək, sisa ira ko~u~u maməɾawan no~u~u mikiŋkiwaj no~u~u nipaŋʦaħ a ɬ~ɮəmak. to~u~una maħaən aɾo~u~umak ko~u~u mitaɬ~ɮo~u~uaj ko~u~u misaako~u~uaj to~u~u niɾəsimət to~u~u b~b~vanaʡ nira a maʦaʦəŋaŋ, taŋasa saɾiko~u~uɾaj ʦi ɾijawso~u~uʦəŋ to~u~u ko~u~u sitato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj tina ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan, makib~b~vanaʡ no~u~u mikiŋkiwaj taŋasa i matini ʦaaj katərak ko~u~u nikasatapaŋ i matini. == piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw ==
S.FORM: U rakarak atu nikasaniyaru' nu i kalingkuay a Pangcah I nacudad namakayra i1985 nu miheca, nasuritan ni "Liyaw-su-ceng". Ta i 1977 nu mihecaan mala kuciw nu Siwlinsiyang, sulinay sibalucu'cira a miherek tu nabalucu'an nira atu sapatudung tu likulay a sabasaba atu wawawawa tu sapabana'tu serangawan nu Tayan atu nikasumad nu rakat a ma'urip, maan naca simainapay i ciraan, araw i 1984 mapulul cira, i papululan caay kasaterep a miherek tu nasuritan nira, milesimet aca tu nu Pangcah a masamaanay a demak tu sikabana' anini. Ina saka cacay a liyad i, pasubana'ay tu lingatu nu Pangcah, atu patudungay tu saayaway ku Pangcah i liyal a ma'urip sanay a kungku, atu serangawan nu binacadan tangasa i Talu ku raritin. Tunamahaen misurit aca tu narakatan a ma'urip nu Pangcah i Taywan, sisa cira a cacay ku mabana'ay tu sasuriten nu payniyaru'an, milesimet aca tu nay kahulaman atu karipunan nu Pangcah. Lalikul tu nu sepat a liyad, saniyaniyaru'han nira a palasepat a patatudung: makayra i amisay a Pangcah,siwkulan a Pangcah,waylay a Pangcah, atu Palidaway a Pangcah. Mapatudung nira ku 'urip atu narakatan nu Pangch. Matiya u nilesimet tunu Tayal katesek, sisa ira ku mamelawan nu mikingkiway nu niPangcah a demak. Tuna mahaen alumak ku mitaduay ku misaakuay tu nilesimet tu bana' nira a macacengang, tangasa salikulay ci Liyawsuceng tu ku sitatudungay tina cudadan, makibana' nu mikingkiway Tangasa i matini caay katerak ku nikasatapang i matini. == Pi'arawan to lakaw ==
S.PHON: o~u~u rakarak ato~u~u nikasanijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u i kaɾiŋko~u~uaj a paŋʦaħ i naʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ namakajra i**** no~u~u miħəʦa, naso~u~uritan ni "ɾijaw-so~u~u-ʦəŋ". ta i **** no~u~u miħəʦaan maɾa ko~u~uʦiw no~u~u siwɾinsijaŋ, so~u~uɾinaj sib~b~vaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡʦira a miħərək to~u~u nab~b~vaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡan nira ato~u~u sapato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u ɾiko~u~uɾaj a sab~b~vasab~b~va ato~u~u wawawawa to~u~u sapab~b~vanaʡto~u~u səraŋawan no~u~u tajan ato~u~u nikaso~u~umaɬ~ɮ no~u~u rakat a maʡo~u~urip, maan naʦa simainapaj i ʦiraan, araw i **** mapo~u~uɾo~u~uɾ ʦira, i papo~u~uɾo~u~uɾan ʦaaj kasatərəp a miħərək to~u~u naso~u~uritan nira, miɾəsimət aʦa to~u~u no~u~u paŋʦaħ a masamaanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak to~u~u sikab~b~vanaʡ anini. ina saka ʦaʦaj a ɾijaɬ~ɮ i, paso~u~ub~b~vanaʡaj to~u~u ɾiŋato~u~u no~u~u paŋʦaħ, ato~u~u pato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj to~u~u saajawaj ko~u~u paŋʦaħ i ɾijaɾ a maʡo~u~urip sanaj a ko~u~uŋko~u~u, ato~u~u səraŋawan no~u~u b~b~vinaʦaɬ~ɮan taŋasa i taɾo~u~u ko~u~u raritin. to~u~unamaħaən miso~u~urit aʦa to~u~u narakatan a maʡo~u~urip no~u~u paŋʦaħ i tajwan, sisa ʦira a ʦaʦaj ko~u~u mab~b~vanaʡaj to~u~u saso~u~uritən no~u~u pajnijaro~u~uʡan, miɾəsimət aʦa to~u~u naj kaħo~u~uɾaman ato~u~u karipo~u~unan no~u~u paŋʦaħ. ɾaɾiko~u~uɾ to~u~u no~u~u səpat a ɾijaɬ~ɮ, sanijanijaro~u~uʡħan nira a paɾasəpat a patato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ: makajra i amisaj a paŋʦaħ,siwko~u~uɾan a paŋʦaħ,wajɾaj a paŋʦaħ, ato~u~u paɾiɬ~ɮawaj a paŋʦaħ. mapato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ nira ko~u~u ʡo~u~urip ato~u~u narakatan no~u~u paŋʦħ. matija o~u~u niɾəsimət to~u~uno~u~u tajaɾ katəsək, sisa ira ko~u~u maməɾawan no~u~u mikiŋkiwaj no~u~u nipaŋʦaħ a ɬ~ɮəmak. to~u~una maħaən aɾo~u~umak ko~u~u mitaɬ~ɮo~u~uaj ko~u~u misaako~u~uaj to~u~u niɾəsimət to~u~u b~b~vanaʡ nira a maʦaʦəŋaŋ, taŋasa saɾiko~u~uɾaj ʦi ɾijawso~u~uʦəŋ to~u~u ko~u~u sitato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj tina ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan, makib~b~vanaʡ no~u~u mikiŋkiwaj taŋasa i matini ʦaaj katərak ko~u~u nikasatapaŋ i matini. == piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw ==
